subcodes.first_line: O nightingales! While the heaven of mercy is raised aloft, take wing; and whilst the rose is yet in the marketplace, raise your lament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیبان تا سماء رحمت مرتفع است پرواز نمائید و تا گل ببازار است بزارید و تا درهای
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @symbolism
